scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.php: php -d upload_max_filesize=20M -d post_max_size=25M -d max_file_uploads=20 -S surgenormusic.test:8000 -t public_html
scripts.start: concurrently --names "php,css,js" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "npm run php" "npm run dev:css" "npm run dev:js"
scripts.view: concurrently --names "php,css,js,browser" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta,green" "npm run php" "npm run dev:css" "npm run dev:js" "node scripts/open-browser.js"
